Description: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username: Admin
2. Enter valid password: admin123
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to Dashboard page

Description: Verify login fails with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid username
2. Enter invalid password
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error alert displays 'Invalid credentials' and user remains on login page

Description: Verify error message for valid username and wrong password
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: Admin
2. Enter wrong password
3. Click Login button

Description: Verify password field masks input characters
Test Steps: 1. Check input tag type attribute of password field
Expected Result: Attribute type equals 'password' representing hidden chars

Description: Verify all login page UI elements are visible
Test Steps:
1. Verify logo image
2. Verify Login header title
3. Verify form input fields and button
4. Verify forgot password link
5. Verify copyright text
Expected Result: All specified login page elements are visible and properly rendered

Description: Verify credential hint box displays default login info
Test Steps: 1. Inspect the credential hint card above login form
Expected Result: Hint box displays 'Username : Admin' and 'Password : admin123'

Description: Verify login page title contains OrangeHRM
Verify login page URL contains auth/login
Verify input placeholders display correct text
Test Steps:
1. Read placeholder attribute of Username input
2. Read placeholder attribute of Password input
Expected Result: Username placeholder is 'Username' and Password placeholder is 'Password'
